meta.notes: Beat Swarm Music Lab intensity audition: short ramp/release pass for listening to low, medium, build, peak, and release arrangement levels. Expected: arrangement state ramps energy/layering/rhythm/melody/ornamentation over the first 32 bars, releases for 8 bars, then settles.
